languages.text: {n}Хейнрикс с легкой улыбкой вытягивает вперед руку с зажатой в ней инсигнией. В воздухе проносится порыв ледяного ветра, и теплая струйка крови выплескивается из правого уха Ювенны.{/n} "Миледи, советую вам проявить смирение и прекратить саботировать беседу".

{n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."
languages.original_text: {n}Хейнрикс с легкой улыбкой вытягивает вперед руку с зажатой в ней инсигнией. В воздухе проносится порыв ледяного ветра, и теплая струйка крови выплескивается из правого уха Ювенны.{/n} "Миледи, советую вам проявить смирение и прекратить саботировать беседу".

traits.locale_text: {n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

{n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

{n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

languages.text: {n}Con el más leve indicio de sonrisa, Heinrix extiende una mano con su insignia en la palma. Un viento gélido os azota, y, de repente, un hilillo de sangre caliente brota de la oreja derecha de Juvenna.{/n} «Mi señora, le sugiero que sea humilde y deje de obstruir esta conversación».
languages.original_text: {n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con el más leve indicio de sonrisa, Heinrix extiende una mano con su insignia en la palma. Un viento gélido os azota, y, de repente, un hilillo de sangre caliente brota de la oreja derecha de Juvenna.{/n} «Mi señora, le sugiero que sea humilde y deje de obstruir esta conversación».

languages.text: {n}海因里希微微一笑，伸出握着徽章的手。一阵刺骨寒风骤然掠过，而后，一股温热的血从尤文娜的右耳中缓缓流出。{/n}“女士，我建议你收敛一点，别妨碍这次谈话。”
languages.original_text: {n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

traits.locale_text: {n}海因里希微微一笑，伸出握着徽章的手。一阵刺骨寒风骤然掠过，而后，一股温热的血从尤文娜的右耳中缓缓流出。{/n}“女士，我建议你收敛一点，别妨碍这次谈话。”

languages.text: {n}Avec l'ombre d'un sourire, Heinrix tend une main dans laquelle il tient son insigne. Une bourrasque glaciale balaie les lieux, et un filet de sang chaud jaillit de l'oreille droite de Juvenna.{/n} « Ma dame, je vous suggère de faire preuve d'humilité et de vous décider enfin à coopérer. »
languages.original_text: {n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec l'ombre d'un sourire, Heinrix tend une main dans laquelle il tient son insigne. Une bourrasque glaciale balaie les lieux, et un filet de sang chaud jaillit de l'oreille droite de Juvenna.{/n} « Ma dame, je vous suggère de faire preuve d'humilité et de vous décider enfin à coopérer. »

languages.text: {n}Hafifçe gülümseyen Heinrix, nişanını tuttuğu elini uzatıyor. Havada buz gibi bir rüzgâr esiyor ve Juvenna'nın sağ kulağından ılık bir kan sızıyor.{/n} "Leydim, biraz alçakgönüllülük göstermenizi ve bu konuşmayı engellemekten vazgeçmenizi öneririm."
languages.original_text: {n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Hafifçe gülümseyen Heinrix, nişanını tuttuğu elini uzatıyor. Havada buz gibi bir rüzgâr esiyor ve Juvenna'nın sağ kulağından ılık bir kan sızıyor.{/n} "Leydim, biraz alçakgönüllülük göstermenizi ve bu konuşmayı engellemekten vazgeçmenizi öneririm."

languages.text: {n}Mit einem dezenten Lächeln streckt Heinrix seine Hand mit seinen Insignien aus. Ein eisiger Wind fegt durch die Luft, ehe warmes Blut aus Juvennas rechtem Ohr sickert.{/n} "Mylady, Ihr solltet etwas demütiger sein und diese Unterhaltung nicht weiter behindern."
languages.original_text: {n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem dezenten Lächeln streckt Heinrix seine Hand mit seinen Insignien aus. Ein eisiger Wind fegt durch die Luft, ehe warmes Blut aus Juvennas rechtem Ohr sickert.{/n} "Mylady, Ihr solltet etwas demütiger sein und diese Unterhaltung nicht weiter behindern."

languages.text:
{n}ヘインリクスは微笑みを浮かべ、徽章を手にした手を差し伸べた。冷たい風は吹き荒れ、ジュベナは右耳から血を流した。{/n}
「お嬢様、謙虚さを示し、この会話を妨げるのを止めた方が良いでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."

traits.locale_text:
{n}ヘインリクスは微笑みを浮かべ、徽章を手にした手を差し伸べた。冷たい風は吹き荒れ、ジュベナは右耳から血を流した。{/n}
「お嬢様、謙虚さを示し、この会話を妨げるのを止めた方が良いでしょう。」
